organization.name: Aniz, Inc.
organization.description: Aniz, Inc. is a nonprofit health and support services agency located in the heart of Atlanta. We are committed to promoting emotional and physical wellness by providing mental health support, substance use counseling, and preventative health services like HIV testing and housing assistance solutions. Through our dedicated efforts, we strive to empower individuals and communities to lead healthier, more fulfilling lives.
organization.address: 236 Forsyth Street SW Suite #300, Atlanta, GA 30303
organization.mission: Aniz, Inc. is on a mission to promote emotional and physical wellness through mental and emotional support services and sexual health education to reduce risk behaviors in individuals affected by sexual health disparities.
organization.vision: Using a holistic approach/model with individuals to develop effective strategies that address issues impacting their overall quality of life.
organization.history: Founded from a deep commitment to families affected by HIV/AIDS and health disparities, ANIZ has grown into a holistic health and support services agency serving Atlanta communities with prevention, counseling, education, and linkage to care.

programs: Your mental health matters. Licensed counselors support clients with individual, group, and family counseling, coping strategies, and compassionate care.
Free and confidential HIV/STI testing with counseling, education, and linkage to care services.
PrEP can lower HIV risk by up to 99% when taken consistently. ANIZ helps clients understand eligibility and start care.
Targeted outreach connects underserved communities to HIV testing, mental health, substance use, harm reduction, sterile syringes, and support resources.
Medical and support services for people living with HIV, including counseling, peer support, transportation referrals, and care coordination.
Evidence-based counseling, education, peer support, and holistic harm reduction for individuals and families navigating substance use.

Events | Aniz, Inc.
pages.description: Get plugged into our upcoming events. Sign up for our newsletter to get frequent updates.

pages.title: Gallery | Aniz, Inc.
pages.description: Step into the Aniz story through these moments. Each photo reflects the heart of our mission—connecting with our community, celebrating milestones, and working together to make a difference.

pages.title: Get Involved | Aniz, Inc.
pages.description: Are you looking to serve the community or join our team? Visit here to look for volunteer and job opening opportunities.

pages.title: Health Education | Aniz, Inc.
pages.description: We offer a wide range of information, tools, and resources to help people stay healthy and happy. From older adults to adolescents, we have a program that caters to your needs. We are dedicated to empowering our clients to take control of their health and reach their full potential.

pages.title: HIV/STI Testing | Aniz, Inc.
pages.description: Our HIV and STI testing services are fast, free and confidential. With our rapid testing, you can know your status in just a few minutes. We understand the importance of knowing your status and provide a discreet and comfortable environment to get tested. Take control of your health and make an appointment today.

pages.title: Holistic Health | Aniz, Inc.
pages.description: Aniz, Inc. is guided by Holistic Harm Reduction best practices. Aniz relies upon evidence-based approaches in treating addiction and activities that have a negative impact on health.

pages.title: Mailing list | Aniz, Inc.
pages.description: Want to stay updated with what is happening at Aniz? Sign up for our newsletter!

pages.title: Mental Health Counseling | Aniz, Inc.
pages.description: We offer a range of mental health services to help stabilize individuals and provide ongoing support and treatment. Among these services include individual therapy, group therapy, substance abuse treatment, and peer support treatment. We have an interdisciplinary team of individuals who are well qualified in providing these services including a therapist, counselor, peer support specialists, case management team, and outreach team.

pages.title: Our CEO | Aniz, Inc.
pages.description: Zina Age, CEO of Aniz, Inc., is a seasoned social worker and addiction counselor with over 30 years of experience. She founded Aniz, Inc. in 1996 to support disadvantaged families impacted by HIV/AIDS and is a renowned speaker and advocate for health equity.

pages.title: Peer Support Groups | Aniz, Inc.
pages.description: Looking for a supportive community to help you navigate challenging experiences? Join our peer support groups! We offer a variety of groups, including support groups for women living with HIV, teens and young adults about sexual health, substance use, and mental health. Our groups come with free resources, so you can focus on building connections with others and get the support you need to thrive.

pages.title: PrEP Care | Aniz, Inc.
pages.description: PrEP can lower your risk of HIV infection by 99%. Learn more about your eligibility with our free PrEP program!

pages.title: Ryan White Services | Aniz, Inc.
pages.description: The Ryan White HIV Program provides compassionate care for those affected by HIV/AIDS, offering tailored medical and support services to improve health and quality of life. Join us in empowering communities and advocating for better outcomes in the fight against HIV/AIDS.

pages.title: Services | Aniz, Inc.
pages.description: At Aniz Inc., we are committed to providing a wide range of holistic health services to support individuals and communities. From HIV prevention and care to mental health support and affordable housing solutions, we are here to help.

pages.title: Substance Use Services | Aniz, Inc.
pages.description: Our substance use program offers comprehensive support to individuals navigating challenges related to substance use. Led by licensed clinicians, we provide personalized care and evidence-based interventions tailored to each individual's needs. From counseling to harm reduction strategies, our team is dedicated to empowering individuals on their journey to recovery and improved well-being.

pages.title: Veil of Secrecy | Aniz, Inc.
pages.description: Read more into the Veil of Secrecy and how it impacts communities of color.

pages.title: Volunteer | Aniz, Inc.
pages.description: Are you interested in volunteering? Sign up with us today!

pages.title: West Cobb Pharmacy | Aniz, Inc.
pages.description: West Cobb Specialty Pharmacy offers personalized medication therapy and high-quality care. Dedicated to meeting your unique needs, we partner with Aniz Inc. to provide comprehensive services and a full range of medications to our members.
